register.title: Bhalisa Njengosangoma
register.subtitle: Joyina uhlu lwethu lwezinyanga zesikhathi esidlule ezithembekile. Iphrofayili yakho izohlolwa ngaphambi kokushicilelwa.
register.name: Igama Eligcwele
register.bioPlaceholder: Tshela abantu ngomsebenzi wakho, ukuqeqeshwa, nefilosofi yokuphulukisa…
register.reviewNotice: Izicelo zihlolwa phakathi kwezinsuku ezingu-3–5 zomsebenzi. Buyela lapha ukuze ubone ukuthi iphrofayili yakho isebenza.
register.successMessage: Siyabonga ngokubhalisa. Sizohlola isicelo sakho bese sikungeza kohlu lwethu maduze.
register.pendingNote: Iphrofayili yakho izobonakala uma iqinisekisiwe yithimba lethu.

home.heroDesc: Xhumana nezangoma ezithembekile eNingizimu Afrika uthole imuthi yendabuko edluliselwa izizukulwane ngezizukulwane.

findSangoma.title: Thola Isangoma
findSangoma.desc: Thola izinyanga zendabuko eseduze nawe, eziqinisekiswe umphakathi.

herbRemedies.title: Imuthi Yezimila
herbRemedies.desc: Hlola indawo yokugcina yezindlela zendabuko ongazilungiselela ekhaya.

symptomGuide.title: Umhlahlandlela Wezimpawu
symptomGuide.desc: Sitshele lokho ozwayo uthole izincomo zemuthi.

home.ctaDesc: Sitshele izimpawu zakho umhlahlandlela wethu azisondeze izindlela zendabuko — axhumane nawe nesangoma uma kunesidingo.

recipes.title: Imuthi Yezimila
recipes.subtitle: Izindlela zendabuko ongazilungiselela ekhaya — ngokunakekela nokuhlonipha.

recommender.title: Umhlahlandlela Wezimpawu
recommender.description: Khetha lokho owuzwayo sizosondeza izimila zendabuko ukusiza.
recommender.disclaimer: Lezi zindlela zilekelela — azithathi indawo — yosonhlalakahle.
recommender.deeperConsult: Ukuze ucele ukubonisana okunzulu nezinyanga zendabuko:
recommender.guideNote: Lo mhlahlandlela unolwazi lwemfundo futhi usekelwe ulwazi lwesiko. Hlala ubonisana nomchweli oqeqeshiwe.
